name: S-17 auto-refresh-daily --source-id narrows the refresh sweep to a single source id
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && printf '2026-05-20T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/g.txt && printf '2026-05-20T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/h.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nexit 0\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --upstream-stub ./up.sh --source-id g 2>err.txt && grep -q '2026-05-25T10:00:00Z' .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/g.txt && grep -q '2026-05-20T00:00:00Z' .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/h.txt && echo narrowed 1>&2
